hero.title: Personal Electron App Template
hero.description: A copy-friendly desktop app starter with the application shell, theme motion, i18n, settings, about page, and lightweight release checks already wired in.

features.title: App-Level UI
features.description: Keeps bottom navigation, titlebar, route transitions, and shadcn/ui basics.

features.title: Languages
features.description: Ships with Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, English, and Japanese resources.

features.title: Theme Motion
features.description: Supports light, dark, and system modes with screenshot mask transitions.

features.title: Update Checks
features.description: Checks GitHub Releases for new versions and opens the download page.
